meta.title: CatSensor - Know Your Cat's Health, Every Day
meta.description: CatSensor helps cat owners monitor weight, body composition, and health trends daily so changes can be caught earlier.

cookie.title: Privacy settings
cookie.body: We use only essential preference storage by default. Optional analytics or marketing cookies stay off unless you consent. See our

meta.title: Privacy Policy | CatSensor
meta.description: Read how CatSensor handles privacy, language preferences, and waitlist information for visitors in Quebec and Canada.

hero.subtitle: Built for Quebec's Loi 25 expectations
hero.description: This policy explains what information CatSensor collects, why it is collected, and how users in Quebec and Canada can request access, correction, or deletion under Loi 25.

cards.title: Data We Collect
items: If you request early access, we collect the email address you submit voluntarily.
We store your language preference locally in your browser so the site can reopen in English or French.
Our hosting provider may process basic technical request data such as IP address, browser type, and access logs to keep the site secure and available.

cards.title: Why We Collect It
items: To manage the CatSensor waitlist and contact you about launch or product availability.
To remember your selected language and keep the site functioning correctly.
To prevent abuse, diagnose technical issues, and maintain website security.

cards.title: Cookies And Trackers
items: No advertising, profiling, or analytics cookies are enabled by default on this site.
The site currently uses only a functional local storage setting for language preference.
If non-essential cookies or tracking tools are added later, they will stay disabled until you give explicit consent.

cards.title: Third-Party Services
items: Data may be processed by our website hosting provider to serve pages and maintain security logs.
If a waitlist or email delivery service is connected later, it will receive only the information needed to manage signups and launch communications.
We do not sell personal information to advertisers or data brokers.

cards.title: Retention Period
items: Waitlist contact details are kept only as long as needed to manage pre-launch communication or until you ask us to delete them.
Technical logs are retained for a limited period appropriate to security and operational needs.
Functional preference data remains in your browser until you clear it or change the setting.

cards.title: Access And Deletion Requests
items: You may request access to your personal information, ask for a correction, or request deletion at any time.
Send your request to privacy@catsensor.ca and include enough information for us to identify your record.
We will answer within the time required by applicable privacy law.

cards.title: Privacy Contact
items: Privacy Officer: CatSensor
Email: privacy@catsensor.ca
Region: Quebec, Canada

cards.title: Transfers Outside Quebec Or Canada
items: We aim to use providers that offer appropriate safeguards for personal information.
If a service provider stores or processes data outside Quebec or Canada, the information may become subject to the laws of that jurisdiction.
When applicable, we limit access contractually and require reasonable protection measures.

commitments.title: How this site applies privacy by default.
commitments.description: This page is written in plain language and is linked directly from the website. Non-essential tracking is off by default, and any future tracking that needs consent must stay inactive until the user opts in.

items.title: Accessible Policy
items.body: The policy is available from the public website in both English and French so visitors can review it before sharing information.

items.title: Explicit Consent
items.body: If analytics, advertising pixels, or similar non-essential tools are introduced, consent must be requested before those technologies are activated.

items.title: High Privacy Defaults
items.body: By default, the site limits collection to what is necessary for core operation and functional preferences only.

timeline.title: From idea to prototype.
timeline.description: Key milestones that shaped CatSensor's early journey in 2026.

items.title: Partnership and field validation
items.summary: William and Samuel teamed up during their Systems Development course and identified the problem that would become CatSensor.
details: Interviews were conducted with veterinarians, cat owners, and professionals in bio-impedance.
A quantitative validation survey was run with around 100 respondents.
The results confirmed the need and helped define product priorities.

items.title: 1st place - Startup Phase 2 Validation
items.summary: William and Samuel won first place at Projet Startup Phase 2 - Validation with CatSensor.
details: The project received official recognition for validation quality and potential.
The roadmap accelerated toward hardware execution.

items.title: Hardware development
items.summary: The summer was focused on building the device and hardware stack.
details: Technical design and iterations were prepared ahead of fall integration.
Core foundations were set for the next product phase.

team.title: Built by cat owners, for cat owners.
team.description: We are building CatSensor to make early health signals simple, visible, and actionable at home.

members.name: Samuel
members.bio: Samuel leads UI/UX and drives the product vision so CatSensor stays simple, clear, and useful in everyday life.

members.name: William
members.bio: William handles the technical side and public relations to move CatSensor forward both in product execution and in the field.

story.missionBody: Born from a deep focus on animal wellbeing, CatSensor brings together veterinary care, engineering, and design to spot meaningful signals earlier.
story.approachBody: Every decision follows one question: does this make life easier for the cat and their human? If not, we rework it.

hero.description: CatSensor tracks your cat's weight and body composition daily - automatically, at home, without effort.

problem.description: By the time symptoms appear, issues have usually been progressing for weeks. Earlier data changes the outcome.

items.title: Silent suffering
items.body: Cats instinctively mask illness - a survival trait. By the time you notice something is wrong, it's often already serious.

items.title: Expensive surprises
items.body: Emergency vet visits cost 3-5x more than preventive care. Most owners only discover issues when the cat stops eating.

items.title: No data at home
items.body: Your cat sees the vet once a year. Between visits, there is no way to track health trends or detect gradual changes.
items.stat: ~1 vet visit per year on average

steps.title: Cat steps on, naturally
steps.body: The feeding station doubles as a precision scale. Every meal becomes an automatic health check - no training, no friction, no extra steps.

steps.title: Bio-impedance analysis
steps.body: Embedded sensors measure electrical resistance through your cat's body, calculating muscle mass, hydration, and fat percentage in seconds.

steps.title: Insights in your pocket
steps.body: The companion app shows daily trends, flags anomalies, and generates vet-ready reports you can share directly with your veterinarian.

features.description: A continuous health dataset built from your cat's daily routine.

items.title: Early Detection
items.description: Catch weight loss, dehydration, or muscle loss weeks before visible symptoms. Get notified when patterns shift.

items.title: Health Trends
items.description: Track 30-day, 90-day, and yearly curves. Understand what's normal for your specific cat - not just averages.

items.title: Vet-Ready Reports
items.description: One-tap export of full health history. Walk into any appointment with data, not just a description of symptoms.

items.title: Effortless Daily Use
items.description: No training required. CatSensor integrates into your cat's existing feeding routine - they never notice it's there.

partners.title: Built with support from the organizations around us.
partners.description: CatSensor is being shaped alongside legal, academic, and startup partners who help us move faster with better foundations.

donation.title: Help move CatSensor forward.

steps.field: Length of the donation or sponsorship commitment

donation.instructionsFoot: The donor can then decide whether or not to add a Zeffy contribution at the end of checkout.
